variants.name: opus
variants.designPhilosophy: Simplicity, elegance, and accuracy. Favor the simplest correct solution. Write thorough tests that cover all scenarios and edge cases — happy paths, error paths, reconnection, version gaps, concurrent writes, and boundary conditions. Every component should be easy to understand, hard to misuse, and fully validated before moving on.
